mapper.sql: id AS settlementId, work_case_id AS workCaseId, amount AS amount, status AS status, approved_by_user_id AS approvedByUserId, due_at AS dueAt, processing_at AS processingAt, completed_at AS completedAt, failure_code AS failureCode
mapper.select: SELECT FROM settlements WHERE work_case_id = #{workCaseId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM disputes WHERE work_case_id = #{workCaseId} AND status IN ('OPEN', 'UNDER_REVIEW') FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE settlements SET status = 'PROCESSING', approved_by_user_id = #{approvedByUserId}, processing_at = NOW(6), failure_code = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{settlementId} AND status = 'WAITING' AND approved_by_user_id IS NULL AND processing_at IS NULL AND completed_at IS NULL

UPDATE settlements SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW(6), updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{settlementId} AND status = 'PROCESSING' AND approved_by_user_id = #{approvedByUserId} AND processing_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NULL
